title: FishCraft Create
description: FishCraft Create Modpack! is a blend of the Create mod, several decorative/building focused mods, and a few performance improvements.
body:
# FishCraft Create Modpack! [Fabric] 1.18.2
A blend of the Create mod, several decorative/building focused mods, and a few performance improvements. The modpack has a semi-vanilla take with no big mods added and adding the flow of the vanilla gameplay to be made easier. 

### List of Primary Mods:
*dependencies excluded

* Chipped
* Chisel & Bits
* Create Fabric
* Decorative Blocks
* Gravestones
* Oh The Biomes You'll Go
* TerraBlender
* theoneprobe-Fabric
* Roughly Enough Items (REI)
* Simple Voice Chat
* Farmer's Delight

### Client Mods:
* Mod Menu
* Better F3
* Bobby
* Logical Zoom
* LambDynamicLights
* Sodium
* Mouse Wheelie
* Freecam (Modrinth Edition)
* Lithium
* Phosphor

Inspired by HermitCraft Create Youtube series. Primarily created and used for the FishCraft SMP Create Server - Interested in joining? https://discord.gg/Qr6eNDguFy
